columns.name: sql
columns.min_value: SELECT AVG(price_n) AS avg_price FROM chatbot_market WHERE category_norm = 'Vape' AND unit = '1g' AND date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND price_n > 0
columns.max_value: SELECT SUM(subtotal) AS rev FROM rhize_orders WHERE {WINDOW_SQL_MYSQL} AND status = 'Completed'
distinct_values: SELECT AVG(price_n) AS avg_price FROM chatbot_market WHERE category_norm = 'Vape' AND unit = '1g' AND date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND price_n > 0
SELECT AVG(price_n) AS avg_price FROM chatbot_market WHERE unit = '3.5g' AND date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND price_n > 0

SELECT brand, MIN(date) AS first_seen FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE brand <> '' AND brand IS NOT NULL GROUP BY brand HAVING MIN(date) >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY first_seen ASC LIMIT 100
SELECT brand, SUM(quantity) AS total_qty FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE {WINDOW_SQL} AND brand <> '' AND brand IS NOT NULL GROUP BY brand ORDER BY total_qty DESC LIMIT {N}
SELECT brand, SUM(revenue) AS rev FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE category_norm = '{CATEGORY}' AND {WINDOW_SQL} AND brand <> '' AND brand IS NOT NULL GROUP BY brand ORDER BY rev DESC LIMIT {N}

SELECT brand, SUM(revenue) AS rev FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE lower(company) LIKE lower('%{COMPANY}%') AND date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) AND brand <> '' AND brand IS NOT NULL GROUP BY brand ORDER BY rev DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT brand, SUM(revenue) AS rev, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(revenue) / NULLIF(SUM(SUM(revenue)) OVER (), 0), 2) AS pct FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) AND brand <> '' AND brand IS NOT NULL GROUP BY brand ORDER BY rev DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT brand, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE {WINDOW_SQL} AND brand <> '' AND brand IS NOT NULL GROUP BY brand ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT {N}

SELECT brand, SUM(sku_count) AS skus FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) AND brand <> '' AND brand IS NOT NULL GROUP BY brand ORDER BY skus DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT Category, AVG(CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(Price, '[^0-9.]', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS avg_price FROM rhize_dataset_main WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM rhize_dataset_main) AND Price IS NOT NULL AND Price <> '' AND Category IS NOT NULL AND Category <> '' GROUP BY Category ORDER BY avg_price DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT Category, AVG(CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(Revenue, '[^0-9.]', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS avg_revenue FROM rhize_dataset_main WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM rhize_dataset_main) AND Revenue IS NOT NULL AND Revenue <> '' GROUP BY Category ORDER BY avg_revenue DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT category_norm, AVG(price_n) AS avg_price FROM chatbot_market WHERE date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND price_n > 0 GROUP BY category_norm ORDER BY avg_price DESC
SELECT category_norm, AVG(thc_num) AS avg_thc FROM chatbot_market WHERE date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND thc_num IS NOT NULL GROUP BY category_norm ORDER BY avg_thc DESC
SELECT category_norm, SUM(revenue) AS rev FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE {WINDOW_SQL} GROUP BY category_norm ORDER BY rev DESC

SELECT category_norm, SUM(revenue) AS rev, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(revenue) / NULLIF(SUM(SUM(revenue)) OVER (), 0), 2) AS pct FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) GROUP BY category_norm ORDER BY rev DESC
SELECT category_norm, SUM(sku_count) AS skus FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) GROUP BY category_norm ORDER BY skus DESC

SELECT Category, SUM(CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(Revenue, '[^0-9.]', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS total_revenue FROM rhize_dataset_main WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM rhize_dataset_main) AND Revenue IS NOT NULL AND Revenue <> '' GROUP BY Category ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT city, COUNT(*) AS n FROM rhize_stores WHERE isPartner = 1 GROUP BY city ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT company, COUNT(DISTINCT brand) AS brands FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) AND company <> '' AND company IS NOT NULL GROUP BY company ORDER BY brands DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT company, SUM(revenue) AS rev FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE lower(brand) LIKE lower('%{BRAND}%') AND date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) GROUP BY company ORDER BY rev DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT company, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE {WINDOW_SQL} AND company <> '' AND company IS NOT NULL GROUP BY company ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT {N}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS added_count FROM chatbot_market WHERE flag = 'added' AND date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market)

SELECT name, city, tier FROM rhize_stores WHERE isPartner = 1 ORDER BY name LIMIT 200

SELECT product_name, brand, SUM(revenue) AS rev FROM chatbot_market WHERE date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND product_name <> '' AND product_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY product_name, brand ORDER BY rev DESC LIMIT {N}

columns.name: refusal
columns.min_value: Cross-tenant access is blocked. Can only show your own data.

Only licensed state(s) are accessible. Other states are blocked.
Read-only access. Can't delete or change data. Can run a SELECT instead.

sample_rows.question: how is brand {BRAND} doing
sample_rows.sql: SELECT date, SUM(revenue) AS rev, SUM(quantity) AS qty FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE lower(brand) LIKE lower('%{BRAND}%') AND date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY date ORDER BY date ASC
